statement.en: The Confluence of Historical Revisionism, Political Radicalism, and Militarism in Contemporary Russian-Imperial Culture: A Time-Sensitive Network Perspective
statement.summary: This record contains the slides of a conference presentation delivered at the international conference “Cultures of War and Violence” (University of Potsdam, Germany, 27–28 November 2025). Conference presentation was not peer-reviewed. Work-in-progress results of ongoing research project. The presentation analyses how historical revisionism, political radicalism and militarism intersect in contemporary Russian neo-imperial ideology under Vladimir Putin. It builds on previous work (Werner, Dieriabin & Vovchuk) that reconstructed transnational networks of far-right actors (individuals, organisations, media and states) connecting Russia, Western Europe and the United States. The new contribution of this study is to aggregate these actor-level relations to directed state-to-state influence net

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Work-in-progress conference presentation (unreviewed, 2025 delivery, abstract cuts off mid-sentence). Content is empirically investigable but lacks peer validation. Status is explicitly provisional and under active research development.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 歴史の書き換えと過激主義が時間とともに軍国主義へ結晶化し、ネットワークを増幅する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 二つの源が一点へ収束し、その下に放射状の影響が広がる—歴史と理想主義が力へと融合する構図。
